name: The Carver

abilities.name: Feed On Paranoia
abilities.text: Once per turn. After an enemy model within 6" makes a Scheme marker, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: (unusual_defense) Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Rusty Shears
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, this model gains an Aura (Negligent) token.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: "They're After You..."
triggers.text: If the target has a Paranoia token, it gains a Slow token. Otherwise, it gains a Paranoia token.

actions.name: Glimpse of Insanity
actions.effects: Target gains a Paranoia token. For each raise this attack receives, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Smashing Pumpkins
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Enemy models within (aura)3" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Paranoia token.

triggers.name: "Found You!"
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with an enemy that was within range of the (aura) and that this model does not have LoS to. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: The unusual_defense icon (U with circle) appears before 'Terrifying' and is also referenced in the Ruthless ability text
